mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.role, u.reader_id, u.status, u.create_time, r.name AS reader_name FROM `user` u LEFT JOIN reader r ON u.reader_id = r.id WHERE u.username = #{username}
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.role, u.reader_id, u.status, u.create_time, r.name AS reader_name FROM `user` u LEFT JOIN reader r ON u.reader_id = r.id WHERE u.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `user` (username, password, role, reader_id, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{role}, #{readerId}, #{status})
